name: Triple Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces white chocolate, chips or chunks
1 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Melt 2 semisweet chocolate squares in a small saucepan.
3. Cut the remaining 6 semisweet chocolate squares into large chunks.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt in a small bowl.
5. Beat butter in a large bowl until creamy. Gradually beat in brown sugar and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Beat in eggs and vanilla. Then beat in melted chocolate.
7. Beat the flour mixture into the chocolate mixture until well blended. Stir in semisweet chocolate chunks and white chocolate chips or chunks.
8. Drop the dough by rounded tablespoons, 2 inches apart, onto ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until slightly browned around the edges. Remove from baking sheets to racks to cool.
You may substitute 8 ounces semisweet chocolate chips for the squares. You will be melting 2 ounces and using the rest as chips.
